PROM-39 __type__/__unit__ metadata-label semantics (upstream experimental type-and-unit-labels feature): upstream drops the metadata labels on computed values the same way it drops __name__, PulsusDB treats them as ordinary labels and keeps them, so the actual series carries two extra labels; homed as the scheduled 'type-and-unit-labels' language feature — M6-08 evaluates-and-decides with these entries as input (issue #64 adjudication); re-homed from 'unary negation over non-scalar' by issue #83 (M6-08a), which implemented unary vector negation — the case still fails only on the kept __type__/__unit__ labels
